SEARCH
Package model.course

Class Course

java.lang.Object
model.course.Course
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Course extends Object implements Serializable
University course. Supports CourseType (MAJOR/MINOR/FREE_ELECTIVE). Can have multiple instructors (e.g. separate lecture + practice teachers).
See Also:
